name: Italian Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausages and garlic in a large saucepan or Dutch oven over medium heat until the sausage is no longer pink.
2. Add the chopped green pepper and onion; cook until tender.
3. Stir in the tomato sauce and seasonings (oregano, chili powder, fennel seed). Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Spoon about 1/2 cup of the mixture onto each split roll.
6. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
7. Serve immediately.
